goal: Find concurrency, 429, and timeout failure modes in the RSS → Deepgram → Gemini path under Gooaye-scale batch import (100 episodes, batch-size 3-10)

findings.title: RSS feed re-fetched in full for every single episode
findings.description: PodcastEpisodeExtractor.extract() fetches the full RSS feed (1-2 MB) for each episode URL. 100 episodes at concurrency 3 = 100 identical GETs to SoundOn in short bursts; likely cause of 429s or socket resets.
findings.recommendation: Module-level Map cache with 10-min TTL on parsed feed, keyed by feedUrl.

findings.title: Gemini per-call cooldown is a global module-level mutex
findings.description: cooldownQueue serializes ALL concurrent Gemini calls through a 1500ms gate. Defeats the key-pool's parallelism intent. Practical throughput limited to ~40 calls/min regardless of batch-size.
findings.recommendation: Make cooldown per-key (Map keyed on apiKey) OR expose GEMINI_COOLDOWN_MS=0 as a §6 tuning knob.

findings.title: No retry on audio download; no timeout on RSS fetch
findings.description: Single fetch() calls with no AbortController or retry on both audio enclosure URL and RSS feed URL. A single transient 429/503 drops the episode.
findings.recommendation: scripts/lib/fetch-utils.ts helper: 3 attempts, 2s/8s backoff, 30s timeout, retry on 429/503/network.

findings.title: Key-pool exhaustion has no cooldown marker; retries burn on known-dead keys
findings.description: withModelFallback re-tries every key after backoff even though Flash-Lite's per-minute quota window is strictly longer than the 5s initial backoff.
findings.recommendation: keyCooldownUntil: Map<string, number>; skip keys still in cooldown; sleep until earliest expires if all cooling.

findings.title: Audio buffered fully in RAM; memory pressure at batch-size >= 5
findings.description: 50-min MP3 ~48 MB; at batch-size 10, ~500 MB peak heap use. GC pause risk, not OOM at default Node limits.
findings.recommendation: Stream enclosure response directly into Deepgram duplex:half path (already exists for YouTube).

findings.title: processedUrls counter may lag DB under SIGINT mid-flush
findings.description: progressInFlight chain may not flush before SIGINT exit; restart duplicates one post via findPostBySourceUrl, misreports imported vs duplicate counts.
findings.recommendation: Verify getScrapeJobById counters are used as source-of-truth on re-entry (appear to be, but confirm in §5.5 idempotency test).

findings.title: Signed enclosure URL breaks transcript cache (not dedup)
findings.description: Transcript cache keyed on enclosureUrl; if SoundOn signs with time-bounded token, cache misses on re-run but post dedup (keyed on podcast-rss:// URL) still catches it.
findings.recommendation: Spot-check enclosure URL stability over 10 min. If signed, switch transcript cache key to podcast-rss:// URL.

findings.title: getApiKey() mutates global keyIndex; usedKeyIndex cosmetic-only but misleads logs
findings.description: usedKeyIndex snapshot may attribute a 429 to another task's key; not a correctness bug but confuses autoresearch tuning signal.
findings.recommendation: Return {key, index} tuple; thread through meta instead of re-deriving.

findings.title: Deepgram retry ladder can consume full 600s outer budget on one episode
findings.description: 180s timeout × 3 attempts = 540s worst-case + 20s retry sleep. Dominates batch window under pathological conditions.
findings.recommendation: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS=120s for podcast path; add --retry-backoff-ms flag (§6.2).

findings.title: isLikelyInvestmentContent pre-filter only fires for Shorts, not podcasts
findings.description: Podcasts always run full Deepgram+Gemini even on off-topic episodes. For Gooaye specifically, impact is negligible (investment-focused).
findings.recommendation: Defer; add episode-title pre-filter when seeding mixed-topic KOLs.

findings.title: Script's own RSS fetch has no AbortController
findings.description: Hung SoundOn connection blocks the script indefinitely before scrape job creation.
findings.recommendation: Wrap with 30s AbortController; batch with F-03 fetch helper.

findings.title: cooldownQueue grows unbounded
findings.description: Promise chain grows 1 link per call; ~800 links in a 100-ep run. Small for seed; matters for long-running cron worker.
findings.recommendation: Single promise + timestamp-compare pattern. Defer unless §8 shows heap growth.

findings.title: onStage callback errors silently swallowed
findings.description: Repeated scrape_job_items write failures log a warning each but never escalate; UI silently stops updating.
findings.recommendation: Throttle warn logs; emit suppressed-count summary at batch end.

findings.title: extractArguments per-ticker failures silently counted as success
findings.description: argumentsOk = some-fulfilled; a 4-of-5-fail case still reports ok=true. Posts can land with zero arguments for some tickers.
findings.recommendation: Track argumentsPartialFailures; add avg(args_per_stock) to summarize-run.ts quality-gate metrics.

findings.title: Default AI_MODEL_CHAIN has a single model; no true fallback on outage
findings.description: Chain ['gemini-2.5-flash-lite']; a Flash-Lite regional outage = all keys fail same model = full 155s backoff repeated.
findings.recommendation: Set AI_MODEL_CHAIN=gemini-2.5-flash-lite,gemini-2.0-flash-exp in .env.local before §8. Document in baseline.md.

hypotheses.hypothesis: RSS feed re-fetched per episode triggers 429 at batch-size >=3
Global cooldown mutex caps Gemini throughput below key-pool capacity
Single audio download 429 permanently fails the episode
Retrying quota-exhausted key within 60s predictably re-429s
Batch-size 10 peak heap exceeds 500 MB; measurable GC pause
Per-ticker extractArguments failures silently hide quality-gate issues
